client_host = request.client.host if request.client else "unknown"
        logger.info(f"📥 REQUEST: {request.method} {request.url.path} from {client_host}")

        # Log query parameters if present
        if request.query_params:
            logger.debug(f"   Query params: {dict(request.query_params)}")

        # Log request headers (excluding sensitive ones)
        safe_headers = {k: v for k, v in request.headers.items()
                       if k.lower() not in ['authorization', 'cookie']}
        logger.debug(f"   Headers: {safe_headers}")

        # Get request body for POST/PUT/PATCH
        if request.method in ["POST", "PUT", "PATCH"]:
            try:
                body = await request.body()
                if body:
                    try:
                        body_json = json.loads(body)
                        logger.debug(f"   Body: {body_json}")
                    except json.JSONDecodeError:
                        logger.debug(f"   Body (raw): {body[:200]}...")  # First 200 chars
            except Exception as e:
                logger.debug(f"   Body read error: {e}")

        # Process request
        response = await call_next(request)

        # Calculate processing time
        process_time = time.time() - start_time

        # Log response
        logger.info(f"📤 RESPONSE: {response.status_code} for {request.method} {request.url.path} ({process_time:.3f}s)")

        # Add custom headers
        response.headers["X-Process-Time"] = str(process_time)

        return response

# Add the logging middleware
app.add_middleware(LoggingMiddleware)

@app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
async def validation_exception_handler(request, exc):
    """Log validation errors for debugging."""
    logger.error(f"❌ VALIDATION ERROR on {request.method} {request.url.path}")
    logger.error(f"   Error details: {exc.errors()}")

    # Try to get body
    try:
        body = await request.body()
        if body:
            try:
                body_json = json.loads(body)
                logger.error(f"   Request body: {body_json}")
            except:
                logger.error(f"   Request body (raw): {body[:500]}")
    except:
        pass

    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=422,
        content={"detail": exc.errors()}
    )

@app.exception_handler(Exception)
async def general_exception_handler(request, exc):
    """Log all unhandled exceptions."""
    logger.error(f"💥 UNHANDLED EXCEPTION on {request.method} {request.url.path}")
    logger.error(f"   Exception type: {type(exc).__name__}")
    logger.error(f"   Exception: {str(exc)}", exc_info=True)

    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=500,
        content={"detail": f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}"}
    )

# Mount static files for React dashboard
app.mount("/static", StaticFiles(directory="static"), name="static")

# Global instances (initialized on startup)
db: Optional[AsyncDialerDB] = None
bot_pool: Optional[BotPoolManager] = None
orchestrator: Optional[DialerOrchestrator] = None

# WebSocket connections for real-time updates
active_websockets: List[WebSocket] = []


# ============================================================================
# Startup/Shutdown Events
# ============================================================================

@app.on_event("startup")
async def startup_event():
    """Initialize dialer components on startup."""
    global db, bot_pool, orchestrator

    logger.info("🚀 Starting Exodus Dialer API...")

raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Dashboard not found")

@app.get("/dashboard", response_class=HTMLResponse)
async def serve_dashboard():
    """Serve the enhanced dialer dashboard HTML."""
    try:
        with open("index.html", "r") as f:
            return HTMLResponse(content=f.read())
    except FileNotFoundError:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Dashboard not found")


# ============================================================================
# Run Server
# ============================================================================

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn

    logger.info("🚀 Starting Exodus Dialer API server...")

    uvicorn.run(
        app,
        host="0.0.0.0",
        port=8000,
        log_level="info"
    )

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 200">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="wireGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#03B1FC;stop-opacity:1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1CA9E6;stop-opacity:0.7"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="softShadow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="shadowBlur"/>
      <feOffset dx="1" dy="1" in="shadowBlur" result="shadow"/>
      <feComposite in2="SourceGraphic" in="shadow" operator="over"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  
  <g id="wireframe-sphere" transform="translate(50, 50) scale(0.8)">
    <!-- Wireframe connections -->
    <line x1="150" y1="50" x2="208.78" y2="69.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="208.78" y1="69.10" x2="245.11" y2="119.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="245.11" y1="119.10" x2="245.11" y2="180.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="245.11" y1="180.90" x2="208.78" y2="230.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="208.78" y1="230.90" x2="150" y2="250" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="150" y1="250" x2="91.22" y2="230.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="91.22" y1="230.90" x2="54.89" y2="180.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="54.89" y1="180.90" x2="54.89" y2="119.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="54.89" y1="119.10" x2="91.22" y2="69.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="91.22" y1="69.10" x2="150" y2="50" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>

    <!-- Additional diagonal connections -->
    <line x1="150" y1="50" x2="245.11" y2="119.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="208.78" y1="69.10" x2="91.22" y2="230.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="245.11" y1="119.10" x2="91.22" y2="230.90" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <line x1="208.78" y1="230.90" x2="91.22" y2="69.10" stroke="url(#wireGradient)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>

    <!-- Vertices -->
    <circle cx="150" cy="50" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="208.78" cy="69.10" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="245.11" cy="119.10" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="245.11" cy="180.90" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="208.78" cy="230.90" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="250" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>

    <circle cx="54.89" cy="119.10" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
    <circle cx="91.22" cy="69.10" r="4" fill="#03B1FC" filter="url(#softShadow)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Text -->
  <text x="250" y="130" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="48" font-weight="bold">
    <tspan fill="#333">Exodus</tspan>
    <tspan fill="#03B1FC" dx="10">AI</tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="170" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#666">
    PREDICTIVE DIALER
  </text>
</svg>

content.thinking: Good! The build succeeded with some warnings (which are just about unused variables). Now I need to copy the built files to the main directory where the dialer API serves them.

input.description: Copy built dashboard files to main directory

content.thinking: Perfect! The files have been copied successfully. The dashboard has been updated with the new SVG logo. Now let me check if the dialer API is running so we can verify the changes.

input.description: Check if dashboard is accessible via API

content.thinking: Great! The API is running and serving the dashboard. The dashboard has been successfully updated with the new SVG logo. The changes are complete and deployed.

content.text:
## SVG Logo Updated Successfully!

I've successfully replaced the SVG on the dashboard with your new AI Sales Agent network visualization. Here's what I did:

1. **Created a new SVG file** (`ai-sales-agent-logo.svg`) with your provided design - a sophisticated network visualization with 37 nodes representing different AI Sales Agent components

2. **Updated the React dashboard** (`BetterApp.js`) to embed the new SVG inline, replacing the simple Phone icon with your complex network diagram showing:
   - Central AI Core (hexagonal structure)
   - Customer Interaction Layer
   - Data Processing Nodes
   - Analytics & Learning Nodes
   - Communication Channels
   - Sales Funnel Stages
   - Connection Paths

3. **Rebuilt the dashboard** and deployed the changes to production

The new logo is now live at http://localhost:8000/dashboard. The SVG features:
- Multiple radial gradients for visual depth
- Hierarchical node structure representing the AI agent architecture
- Blue (#4A90E2, #6FAADB) and gray (#78909C) color scheme
- 37 interconnected nodes showing the complexity of the AI sales system

The dashboard is running and accessible with your new sophisticated network visualization logo!
